name: lock file merge logic uses union for the pr_corpus_patterns section per the section 2.7 contract
command: printf '{"pr_corpus_patterns":{"p1":"x"}}\n' > a.json && printf '{"pr_corpus_patterns":{"p2":"y"}}\n' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/merge-lock.sh" --a a.json --b b.json --out merged.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"p1":"x"' merged.json && grep -q '"p2":"y"' merged.json && echo ok 1>&2
